title: Manage your Lightning nodes with ease
subtitle: An intuitive interface for managing your Lightning Network nodes

sections.title: About Daznode
sections.content: Daznode is a comprehensive solution for Lightning Network node management, designed to make the user experience as simple and efficient as possible.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.content: Our mission is to make Lightning Network node management accessible to everyone while maintaining the highest standards of security and performance.
